title: erigeron multiradiatus
intro: Erigeron multiradiatus, also known as the Western daisy fleabane, is a flowering plant species native to North America. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antimicrobial properties. The plant is believed to provide various health benefits, such as reducing fever, soothing respiratory issues, and aiding in wound healing. Herbal preparations of Erigeron multiradiatus include infusions, tinctures, and salves, which can be used to treat a range of health conditions.
